00:19:54	Dragan Rakita:	It is about disk format, it behaves badly on ZFS bcs of the way how db works, this probably effects other clients too, preference is at ext4.
00:20:40	Louis:	Reacted to "updating this with t..." with 👍
00:21:02	Stefan Starflinger:	It affects erigon and reth, both use a CoW database which duplicates work and slows down performance
00:21:23	Stefan Starflinger:	also ZFS by default has a 128k block size which is not great for databases (but we've modified this to 16k)
00:21:24	Dragan Rakita:	Reacted to "It affects erigon an..." with 👍
00:24:04	Stefan Starflinger:	is it possible to set the record size of MDBX to 16k as well?
00:24:45	Stefan Starflinger:	maybe thats something we can do to improve performance a bit while keeping the benefits of ZFS
00:25:16	Dragan Rakita:	Replying to "maybe thats somethin..."

00:26:52	Dragan Rakita:	Replying to "maybe thats somethin..."
